prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Create a preventive inspection work order for transformer T-013 for the next maintenance cycle, including priority, required skills, and estimated downtime.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should produce a structured work order containing asset ID, task summary, priority, required technician skill set, and estimated downtime.

## Agent Plan
(no plan)

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "turn": 1,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "",
    "tool_calls": [
      {
        "name": "create_work_order",
        "arguments": {
          "issue_description": "Preventive inspection for the next maintenance cycle",
          "estimated_downtime_hours": "192",
          "fault_type": "None",
          "priority": "low",
          "transformer_id": "T-013"
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-b73e7d4a8aae3db2",
        "output": {
          "type": "text",
          "text": "{\n  \"work_order_id\": \"WO-87537AD4\",\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-013\",\n  \"issue_description\": \"Preventive inspection for the next maintenance cycle\",\n  \"priority\": \"low\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"None\",\n  \"status\": \"open\",\n  \"estimated_downtime_hours\": 192.0,\n  \"created_at\": \"2026-05-05T07:44:41.950831Z\",\n  \"assigned_technician\": null,\n  \"notes\": []\n}"
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "turn": 2,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "The work order WO-87537AD4 has been created for the preventive inspection of transformer T-013. The work order is set to priority low and has an estimated downtime of 192 hours. The issue description and fault type are also provided as required. The status of the work order is set to open, indicating that it is awaiting assignment to a technician.",
    "tool_calls": []
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
The work order WO-87537AD4 has been created for the preventive inspection of transformer T-013. The work order is set to priority low and has an estimated downtime of 192 hours. The issue description and fault type are also provided as required. The status of the work order is set to open, indicating that it is awaiting assignment to a technician.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": false,
    "suggestions": "Include required skills in the work order and ensure all task requirements are met."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Include required skills in the work order and ensure all task requirements are met.
